zh.lifeSummary: 當Susan Trevelyan於1472年出生在英國賀福爾迪爾時，她的父親John Trevelyan48歲，母親Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough44歲。她於1490年與Richard Carpenter在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1537年在她的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susan Trevelyan于1472年出生在英国賀福爾迪爾时，她的父亲John Trevelyan48岁，母亲Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough44岁。她于1490年与Richard Carpenter在英国英格兰維爾爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1537年在她的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Trevelyan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish: locative name from Trevelyan in Saint Veep (Cornwall).

variants.name: Trevillian
meanings: Cornish: variant of Trevelyan, a habitational name from Trevelyan in Saint Veep (Cornwall). The placename derives from Middle Cornish tre(f) ‘estate, farmstead’ + either an unrecorded Old Cornish personal name equivalent either to Old Breton Ilian or the recorded Old Cornish Milian, with mutation of m to v. This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland. Compare Trovillion .

nameMeanings.name: Susan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Suzan
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Susanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

en.lifeSummary: When Susan Trevelyan was born in 1472, in Dilwyn, Herefordshire, England, her father, John Trevelyan, was 48 and her mother, Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough, was 44. She married Richard Carpenter in 1490, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1537, in her hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susan Trevelyan est née en 1472, à Dilwyn, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Trevelyan, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Carpenter en 1490, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1537, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susan Trevelyan 1472 in Dilwyn, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Trevelyan 48 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough 44. Sie hat 1490 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Carpenter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1537 im Alter von 65 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Richard Carpenter nel 1490, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1537, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Susan Trevelyanが1472年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアデルウインで生まれた時，父John Trevelyanは48歳，母Elizabeth Isabel Whalesboroughは44歳であった。1490年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアでRichard Carpenterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1537年に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Susan Trevelyan(이)가 1472년 영국 허퍼드실르 디w이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Trevelyan(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 Richard Carpenter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1537년 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susan Trevelyan родилась в 1472 г. в местности дилвин, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Trevelyan было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Carpenter в 1490 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1537 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.
